prompt: Tap seat S3 before evaluating call, fold, or raise_to.
why_v1: Seat context controls default pressure responses.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Seat S3 is the pressured player in this rep, so anchoring that seat first keeps the call, fold, or raise decision tied to the right context.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. seat S3 is the exact player in this pressure spot, so anchor that seat first. A different seat would face a different price, order, and pressure decision.
